CVE-2021-23369.title: The package handlebars before 4.7.7 are vulnerable to Remote Code ...
CVE-2021-23369.description: The package handlebars before 4.7.7 are vulnerable to Remote Code Execution (RCE) when selecting certain compiling options to compile templates coming from an untrusted source.
CVE-2021-23369.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.
